reviews.review_body: Good near by CBSE school. Play ground available.

reviews.author: Praveen Kumar
reviews.review_body:
Vidyanjali Grammar School (VGS) has a holistic curriculum for an all-around development of your child, to nurture and grow up to be a responsible citizen of our country.

VGS has excellent management and leadership skills in their approach, which offers the students to excel in education, sport, culture and civic responsibilities.

Mrs Sunitha Paul is the Principal, who continuously drives excellence in the academics, culture and absolute discipline in Students and Staff.

Mrs Sunitha has set clear achievable goals and strives hard to achieve them.

I must say the VGS staff and the management are realistic, down to earth and accept “no-nonsense”.

They have a clear cut goal ahead of them and strive hard to deliver the very best for your Children.

We wish VGS the very best in all their endeavors.
